languages.text: "Я не способ{mf|ен|на} разрешить ваш спор, ибо недостаточно сведущ{mf||а} в таинствах Бога-Машины".
"I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."
languages.original_text: "Я не способ{mf|ен|на} разрешить ваш спор, ибо недостаточно сведущ{mf||а} в таинствах Бога-Машины".

traits.locale_text: "I am not capable of resolving your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."
"I am not capable of resolving your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."
"I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."
"I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

"I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

languages.text: "Ich kann Euren Disput nicht beilegen und kenne mich mit den Mysterien des Maschinengottes nicht gut genug aus."
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: "Ich kann Euren Disput nicht beilegen und kenne mich mit den Mysterien des Maschinengottes nicht gut genug aus."

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas en mesure de trancher. Je ne connais pas suffisamment les mystères du Dieu-Machine. »
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas en mesure de trancher. Je ne connais pas suffisamment les mystères du Dieu-Machine. »

languages.text: “我无法解决你们的争端，因为我还不够了解万机之神的奥秘。”
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: “我无法解决你们的争端，因为我还不够了解万机之神的奥秘。”

languages.text: «No puedo resolver su disputa, ya que no comprendo suficientemente los misterios del Dios Máquina».
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: «No puedo resolver su disputa, ya que no comprendo suficientemente los misterios del Dios Máquina».

languages.text: 「私はマシン神の神秘について十分な知識がないので、あなたの論争を解決することはできない。」
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: 「私はマシン神の神秘について十分な知識がないので、あなたの論争を解決することはできない。」

languages.text: "Aranızdaki anlaşmazlığı çözemem çünkü Makine Tanrı'nın gizemleri hakkında yeterli bilgiye sahip değilim."
languages.original_text: "I am not able to resolve your dispute, for I lack sufficient knowledge of the Machine God's mysteries."

traits.locale_text: "Aranızdaki anlaşmazlığı çözemem çünkü Makine Tanrı'nın gizemleri hakkında yeterli bilgiye sahip değilim."
